result.stdout:
USAGE: femto [--help] [--validate] [--resolve] [--version [<string>]]
             [install <package>] [uninstall <package>] [<path>]

PROJECT:

    <path>                specify the path to the F# project.

OPTIONS:

    --validate            check that the XML tags used in the F# project file
                          are parsable and a npm package version can be
                          calculated.
    --resolve             resolve and install required packages.
    --version [<string>]  display the current version of Femto.
    install <package>     install a package into a project
    uninstall <package>   uninstall a package from the project
    --help                display this list of options.
